articles.title: As Dogecoin Spikes 13%, Former DOGE Millionaire Thinks of Grabbing Some More
articles.description: Dogecoin holder Glauber Contessoto, known as a former DOGE millionaire now, says he considers adding more DOGE to his holdings, despite the coin’s 13% growth

articles.title: Litecoin is ‘cruising,’ but here’s why there’s so much more to it
articles.description: Most market altcoins rallied on the back of decent on-chain activity over the past fortnight. While many of these cryptos hiked as anticipated, Litecoin took many in the market by surprise. It was not just the price gains, but the general growth from an on-chain perspective as well. articles.title: Bitcoin SV rocked by three 51% attacks in as many months
articles.description: Bitcoin SV has been under the hammer of rogue actors in a series of attempted 51% attacks against the network. Where next for BSV?

articles.description: Will ICP recapture some of its former value?

articles.title: Bitcoin Whales Suddenly Move $1,700,000,000 in BTC, Santiment Says Holdings of Crypto Millionaires Near All-Time High
articles.description: Bitcoin (BTC) whales are moving massive amounts of BTC as the leading crypto asset prints a new 30-day high at $43,271. Blockchain tracker Whale Alert spotted four large Bitcoin transactions in which crypto whales relocated 41,671 BTC, worth $1.78 billion, in a span of one hour. 10,400.90 BTC worth $446.35 million sent from unknown wallet […]

articles.title: Biden Administration Weighs In on Competing Crypto Amendments As Final Vote Approaches
articles.description: The White House is weighing in on a last-minute dash to modify a set of cryptocurrency tax provisions in the bipartisan infrastructure bill. The provisions are designed to help pay for the repair of roads and bridges, among other projects, by clamping down on potential tax evasion through the use of cryptocurrencies. The original, unmodified […]

articles.title: Bitcoin’s ‘Refreshed Bull Market’ Could See It Hit $100,000, Says Bloomberg Analyst
articles.description: Bloomberg analyst Mike McGlone has revealed he believes both Bitcoin and Ethereum are “discounted bull markets” that solidified their support bases in June and July, and could resume their upward price trajectories in the near future, with $100,000 being in play for BTC. In the latest edition of the Bloomberg Galaxy Crypto Index (BGCI) report, McGlone […]
